segments.speaker: 题目15/16
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. I'm so excited for the outdoor concert this weekend. Have you seen the weather forecast? What gets that's disappointing? I was really looking forward to going. same here. Any thoughts on what to do instead? I heard there's a new exhibit opening on saturday. The art gallery tickets go on sale tomorrow. Count me in. We can meet up for breakfast that morning, too.
